    <item>
        <guid>nba529779</guid>
        <title>Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: Nears double-double in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/shai-gilgeous-alexander-4387</link>
        <description>Gilgeous-Alexander supplied 37 points (13-25 FG, 2-5 3Pt, 9-9 FT), nine assists, five rebounds and one steal across 38 minutes in Wednesday's 120-107 Game 2 win over the Suns in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 9:31:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529778</guid>
        <title>Jalen Williams: Exits early Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-williams-5687</link>
        <description>Williams exited Wednesday's 120-107 Game 2 win over the Suns in the third quarter and did not return due to an apparent left hamstring injury, finishing with 19 points (7-11 FG, 2-3 3Pt, 3-5 FT), four assists, one rebound and one steal in 23 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 9:21:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529777</guid>
        <title>Jalen Williams: Exits to locker room</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-williams-5687</link>
        <description>Williams exited to the locker room in the third quarter of Wednesday's Game 2 against the Suns due to an apparent left hamstring injury, Brandon Rahbar of DailyThunder.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 8:32:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529776</guid>
        <title>Cade Cunningham: Powers Detroit to victory</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/cade-cunningham-5336</link>
        <description>Cunningham contributed 27 points (11-19 FG, 1-6 3Pt, 4-8 FT), 11 assists, six rebounds, one block and one steal across 37 minutes in Wednesday's 98-83 Game 2 win over the Magic in the first round of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 7:07:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529772</guid>
        <title>Mark Williams: Ruled out Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/mark-williams-5647</link>
        <description>Williams (foot) has been ruled out for Wednesday's Game 2 against the Thunder, Kellan Olson of ArizonaSports.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 22 Apr 2026 5:02:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
